mapper.insert: INSERT INTO income (user_id, family_group_id, category_id, amount, transaction_date, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{familyGroupId}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{transactionDate}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM income WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM income WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_group_id = #{familyGroupId}
